purpose: Retrieve synthetic evidence metadata for one claim evidence bundle.
returns: all evidence document metadata records for the bundle
evaluation_logic: Resolve applicable evidence profile from Item #2 only after policy and category are resolved.
A REQUIRED evidence type is satisfied only when at least one matching document record has document_status=RECEIVED_VALID.
RECEIVED_UNREADABLE is not sufficient and should trigger a targeted request for re-upload.
RECEIVED_CONTRADICTORY should trigger MANUAL_REVIEW rather than agent resolution.

failure_handling.unknown_bundle_id: MANUAL_REVIEW with DATA_CONFLICT; do not infer document availability.
